briefing: Good morning, Tel Aviv! ☀️ Today's shaping up hot and dry with a high near 89°F and an overnight low around 75°F — 0% chance of rain, so no umbrella needed. Heads up: it'll keep climbing slightly over the next couple of days, hitting 90°F by Thursday, so stay hydrated and seek shade during peak afternoon hours!

hebrew.example: היא מִתְמוֹדֶדֶת עִם הַרְבֵּה לַחַץ בָּעֲבוֹדָה (She's dealing with a lot of pressure at work)
